variants.hook_text: Sitting 8 hours a day? Your lymph system is screaming.
variants.ae_brief: Energetic female trainer, 35, gym setting, direct camera. Quick cuts: office chair → swollen ankles → lymph diagram animation. Punchy text overlay on 'screaming'.

variants.hook_text: My doctor said this was just aging. She was wrong.
variants.ae_brief: Woman 55, soft lighting, sitting at home, no makeup. Talking head UGC style. Slow zoom in. Lower-third caption.

variants.hook_text: POV: you finally figured out why your neck always hurts.
variants.ae_brief: Woman 28, selfie cam angle, bedroom mirror. Vertical phone-shot vibe. Quick text reveal. Trendy music cue.

variants.hook_text: If you wake up stiff every morning, this 90-second routine will shock you.
variants.ae_brief: Asian man 60, gentle expert energy, yoga mat. Before/after split screen. Stopwatch graphic. Clean medical aesthetic.

variants.hook_text: I asked my mom why she had a hump. Her answer changed everything.
variants.ae_brief: Black woman 35, talking about her mother, with old photos. Slow story-style. Family photos as B-roll. Subtle music build.
